mapper.sql: report_id, reporter_id, target_type, target_id, reason, status, handler_id, handle_time, handle_result, report_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM report WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY report_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE reporter_id = #{reporterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = 0
SELECT FROM report ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT FROM report WHERE reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR target_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR reporter_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY report_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR target_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR reporter_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
